description_long: This is a stately bank building with a neoclassical facade, featuring a prominent triangular pediment supported by six large, fluted columns. The exterior is primarily white with brown accents at the base and around the entrance, giving it a distinguished and formal appearance. The front elevation includes tall, arched windows with decorative grilles and a central double-door entrance framed by ornate pilasters. The roofline is adorned with a balustrade and subtle cornice detailing, while the sides and rear are plain and windowless. The structure sits on a stone or concrete base, suggesting durability and permanence. The overall design conveys security and trust, typical of traditional financial institutions.
description: A grand neoclassical bank building with a columned white facade, brown accents, and a central ornate entrance. The structure exudes formality and security, with decorative windows and a prominent pediment.
description_view_0: The front view showcases the imposing columned facade, central double-door entrance, arched windows, and detailed pediment.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, windowless wall with the building's depth and roofline details visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a flat, featureless wall with a continuous balustrade along the roof, lacking windows or doors.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a solid, unadorned wall and the building's rectangular depth.
attribute_signage: Gold-colored text signage above the entrance, spanning the width of the central facade, with serif-style capital letters. The exact text is not fully legible in the image.
attribute_entrance_design: Central double-door entrance made of glass and metal, framed by ornate pilasters and flanked by large columns, with decorative grilles above and a prominent pediment overhead.
